![{61D7FEDB-2432-4AE2-AA35-060B701B19AF}.png](data:image/png;base64,)
And it's more urgent than ever.

Today I am not delving into frame injections yet though. I am not doing that.

It's all centered on the "LTX ADD GUIDE NODE"
# LTX Add Guide Node
What does it do?
> The LTXVAddGuide node is a component in the ComfyUI ecosystem that facilitates the integration of guidance data into various workflows. Its primary function is to augment existing processes by providing additional positional or contextual information to improve the overall system output.

So guidance data integration got it. That date being either coordinates, an actual image or json?

It feels like something important. and I can't wait to ignore it. and then wonder why am I stuck on one problem generation loop for no apparent reason.

## ## **Expert Workflow Hacks to Stop Visual Artifacts**

**Fix the Image-to-Video drift due to compression:** - **Skip the downscale node entirely. Feed your reference image at its native resolution.**

**Use the FFLF method:** skip text prompt and control the motion in-between the first and last frames you decided on.

**Stop the audio hallucinations:** don't leave empty nor use negative prompts just type “silent, no sound” or “the steady hum of an air conditioner” to keep the track clean.

**Re-inject the guide frame:** When you pass your video to the spatial upscaler, use the `LTXVAddGuideMulti` node. Re-inject your original reference image. This forces the upscaler to preserve the exact face details. - I don't get this one. After the generation this is?

**Stabilize high-speed motion:** LTX-2.3 fails at complex action scenes. Increase your frame rate to 50 FPS. This feeds the model more temporal tokens. It helps prevent objects from turning into rubber.

LTX HAS A FUCKING UPSCALER? IT MAEKS SENSE TO HAVE AN UPSCLAER FOR VIDEO AT THIS POITN. BUT WHAT?

this is an intereseting node 
- **LTXVSaveConditioning** - Save text encodings to disk for reuse
- **LTXVLoadConditioning** - Load pre-saved text encodings""
might need a use case for it one day. we could have well made generated and GENERAL conditionings to reuse over and over again. since the rest is through the image guidance. 
we just need a consistent composition. a smart adaptable one. I need to be wary of SOS.
